103.name: Thorns
103.description:
Casting Barkskin sprouts thorns on you for 12 sec. When victim to melee attacks, thorns deals 432 Nature damage back to the attacker.

Attackers also have their movement speed reduced by 50% for 4 sec.

103.name: Freedom of the Herd
103.description: Your Stampeding Roar clears all roots and snares from yourself and allies.

103.name: Malorne's Swiftness
103.description: Your Travel Form movement speed while within a Battleground or Arena is increased by 20% and you always move at 100% movement speed while in Travel Form.

103.name: Ferocious Wound
103.description: Attacking with a 5 combo point Ferocious Bite reduces the target's maximum health by up to 3% for 30 sec, stacking up to 2 times. Ferocious Wound can only be active on one target at once.

103.name: Fresh Wound
103.description: Rake has a 100% increased critical strike chance if used on a target that doesn’t already have Rake active.

103.name: Wicked Claws
103.description:
Infected Wounds can now stack up to 2 times, and reduces 8% of all healing received by the target per stack.

Infected Wounds can now also be applied from Rip.

103.name: Savage Momentum
103.description: Interrupting a spell with Skull Bash reduces the remaining cooldown of Tiger's Fury, Survival Instincts, and Dash by 10 sec.

103.name: Strength of the Wild
103.description:
You become further adept in Caster Form and Bear Form.

Caster Form
When using Regrowth on an ally the initial heal will have a 30% increased critical chance and the cast time of Regrowth will be reduced by 50% for 6 sec.

Bear Form
Maximum health while in Bear Form increased by 15% and you gain 5 Rage when attacked in Bear Form.

You also learn:

 Strength of the Wild
Maul the target for 8% of the target's maximum health in Physical damage.

103.name: Leader of the Pack
103.description:
While in Cat Form, you increase the movement speed of raid members within 20 yards by 10%.

Leader of the Pack also causes allies to heal themselves for 3% of their maximum health when they critically hit with a direct attack. The healing effect cannot occur more than once every 8 sec.

103.name: High Winds
103.description: Increases the range of Cyclone, Typhoon, and Entangling Roots by 5 yds.

103.name: Tireless Pursuit
103.description: For 3 sec after leaving Cat Form or Travel Form, you retain up to 25% movement speed.

252.name: Life and Death
252.description:
When the target afflicted with your Dread Plague is healed, you are also healed for 10% of the amount.

Additionally, Dread Plague deals 200% of its remaining damage to the target when dispelled.

252.name: Dark Simulacrum
252.description: Places a dark ward on an enemy player that persists for 12 sec, triggering when the enemy next spends mana on a spell, and allowing the Death Knight to unleash an exact duplicate of that spell.

252.name: Necrotic Wounds
252.description:
Putrefy applies a Necrotic Wound to the enemy when it deals damage, absorbing 8% of all healing received for 15 sec.

Max 3 stacks. Adding a stack does not refresh the duration.

252.name: Zombify
252.description:
Reanimates a nearby corpse, summoning a zombie for 20 sec that slowly moves towards your target. 

If your zombie reaches its target, it explodes after 3.0 sec. The explosion stuns all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec and deals 10% of their health in Shadow damage.

252.name: Stitchmaster
252.description:
When a Lesser Ghoul dies, you gather the remains to heal for 2% of its maximum health.

Death Strike sacrifices all Lesser Ghouls under your command.

252.name: Strangulate
252.description: Shadowy tendrils constrict an enemy's throat, silencing them for 4 sec.

252.name: Doomburst
252.description: Sudden Doom also causes your next Death Coil to deal the damage of your plagues an additional time at 25% effectiveness and reduce the target's movement speed by 45% for 3 sec.

252.name: Rot and Wither
252.description: Your Death and Decay rots enemies each time it deals damage, absorbing healing equal to 100% of damage dealt.

252.name: Bloodforged Armor
252.description: Death Strike reduces all Physical damage taken by 25% for 4 sec.

252.name: Spellwarden
252.description: Anti-Magic Shell is now usable on allies and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

250.name: Rot and Wither
250.description: Your Death and Decay rots enemies each time it deals damage, absorbing healing equal to 100% of damage dealt.

250.name: Strangulate
250.description: Shadowy tendrils constrict an enemy's throat, silencing them for 4 sec.

250.name: Last Dance
250.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dancing Rune Weapon by 50% and its duration by 25%.

250.name: Death Chain
250.description: Chains 3 enemies together, dealing 10.1 Shadow damage and causing 20% of all damage taken to also be received by the others in the chain. Lasts for 10 sec.

250.name: Murderous Intent
250.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

250.name: Decomposing Aura
250.description: All enemies within 8 yards slowly decay, losing up to 3% of their max health every 2 sec. Max 5 stacks. Lasts 6 sec.

250.name: Dark Simulacrum
250.description: Places a dark ward on an enemy player that persists for 12 sec, triggering when the enemy next spends mana on a spell, and allowing the Death Knight to unleash an exact duplicate of that spell.

250.name: Bloodforged Armor
250.description: Death Strike reduces all Physical damage taken by 25% for 4 sec.

250.name: Spellwarden
250.description: Anti-Magic Shell is now usable on allies and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

250.name: Price of Progress
250.description: You sacrifice 1% of your health every 1 sec and in exchange you cannot be slowed below 90% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks. Lasts until canceled.

104.name: Master Shapeshifter
104.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

 Caster Form
Rejuvenation heals for 30% more and causes you to instantly generate 25 Rage after entering Bear Form.

 Moonkin Form
Wrath, Starfire, and Starsurge deal 30% additional damage and cause you to instantly generate 25 Rage after entering Bear Form.

 Cat Form
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal 60% additional damage and cause you to instantly generate 50 Rage after entering Bear Form when cast with 5 combo points.

104.name: Den Mother
104.description:
You bolster nearby allies within 15 yards, increasing their maximum health by 15%.

The duration of all stun effects on you is reduced by 15%.

104.name: Demoralizing Roar
104.description: Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they do by 20% for 8 sec.

104.name: Charging Bash
104.description: Increases the range of your Skull Bash by 10 yards.

104.name: Entangling Claws
104.description: Entangling Roots is now an instant cast spell with a 6 second cooldown but with a 10 yard range. It can also be cast while in shapeshift forms.

104.name: Overrun
104.description: Charge to an enemy, stunning them for 3 sec and knocking back their allies within 15 yards.

104.name: Emerald Slumber
104.description:
Embrace the Emerald Dream, causing you to enter a deep slumber for 8 sec. While sleeping, all other cooldowns recover 400% faster, and allies within 40 yds are healed for 21 every 1 sec.

Direct damage taken may awaken you.

104.name: Alpha Challenge
104.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

104.name: Malorne's Swiftness
104.description: Your Travel Form movement speed while within a Battleground or Arena is increased by 20% and you always move at 100% movement speed while in Travel Form.

104.name: Freedom of the Herd
104.description: Your Stampeding Roar clears all roots and snares from yourself and allies.

104.name: Grove Protection
104.description: Summon a grove to protect allies in the area for 10 sec, reducing damage taken by 50% from enemies outside the grove.

104.name: Tireless Pursuit
104.description: For 3 sec after leaving Cat Form or Travel Form, you retain up to 25% movement speed.

62.name: Improved Mass Invisibility
62.description: The cooldown of Mass Invisibility is reduced by 4 min and can affect allies in combat.

62.name: Kleptomania
62.description:
Unleash a flurry of disruptive magic onto your target, stealing a beneficial magic effect every 0.4 sec for 3.6 sec.

Castable while moving, but movement speed is reduced by 40% while channeling.

62.name: Arcanosphere
62.description: Builds a sphere of Arcane energy, gaining power over 4 sec. Upon release, the sphere passes through any barriers, knocking enemies back and dealing up to 13,734 Arcane damage.

62.name: Ice Wall
62.description: Conjures an Ice Wall 30 yards long that obstructs line of sight. The wall has 30% of your maximum health and lasts up to 15 sec.

62.name: Ring of Fire
62.description: Summons a Ring of Fire for 8 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are disoriented and burn for 3% of their total health over 3 sec.

62.name: Master Shepherd
62.description:
While an enemy player is affected by your Polymorph or Mass Polymorph, your movement speed is increased by 25% and your Versatility is increased by 12%. 

Additionally, Polymorph and Mass Polymorph no longer heal enemies.

62.name: Ethereal Blink
62.description: Blink and Shimmer apply Slow at 100% effectiveness to all enemies you Blink through. For each enemy you Blink through, the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

62.name: Chrono Shift
62.description: Arcane Barrage slows enemies by 50% and increases your movement speed by 10% for 5 sec.

62.name: Overpowered Barrier
62.description:
Your barriers absorb 100% more damage and have an additional effect, but last 4 sec.

 Prismatic Barrier
If the barrier is fully absorbed, your next Blink or Shimmer within 15 sec grants Invisibility and immunity to damage for 3 sec. The damage reduction is lost if Invisibility ends.

64.description:
When your Frost Nova or Water Elemental's Freeze is dispelled or removed, become immune to snares for 3 sec. 

This effect can only occur once every 10 sec.

64.name: Concentrated Coolness
64.description: Frozen Orb's damage is increased by 10% and is now castable at a location with a 40 yard range but no longer moves.

64.name: Ice Wall
64.description: Conjures an Ice Wall 30 yards long that obstructs line of sight. The wall has 30% of your maximum health and lasts up to 15 sec.

64.name: Ring of Fire
64.description: Summons a Ring of Fire for 8 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are disoriented and burn for 3% of their total health over 3 sec.

64.name: Frost Bomb
64.description:

If Frost Bomb is dispelled before it explodes, gain a charge of Brain Freeze.

64.name: Snowdrift
64.description:
Summon a strong Blizzard that surrounds you for 6 sec that slows enemies by 70% and deals 76 Frost damage every 1 sec. 

Enemies that are caught in Snowdrift for 2 sec consecutively become Frozen in ice, stunned for 4 sec.

73.name: Disarm
73.description: Disarm the enemy's weapons and shield for 5 sec. Disarmed creatures deal significantly reduced damage.

73.name: Bodyguard
73.description:
Protect an ally, causing 40% of all Physical damage they take to be transfered to you. When the target takes Physical damage, your Shield Slam cooldown has a 30% chance to be reset. Bodyguard is cancelled if the target is further than 20 yards from you. Lasts 1 min.

Only one target can be Bodyguarded at a time.

73.name: Morale Killer
73.description: Reduces the cooldown of Demoralizing Shout by 15 sec, and Demoralizing Shout now reduces the damage enemies deal to all targets, not just you.

73.name: Shield Bash
73.description: When Shield Slam is used on targets that are casting, it reduces their damage done by 15% for 8 sec and the cooldown is instantly reset.

73.name: Thunderstruck
73.description: After casting Avatar, Shockwave, or Stormbolt, your next Thunder Clap roots all targets it damages for 4 sec.

73.name: Dragon Charge
73.description: Run at high speed at a distance in front of you. All enemies in your path will take 24 Physical damage and be knocked back.

73.name: Rebound
73.description:
Spell Reflection reflects the next 2 incoming spells cast on you and reflected spells deal 100% extra damage to the attacker.

Spell Reflection's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

73.name: Oppressor
73.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

73.name: Demolition
73.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shattering Throw or Wrecking Throw by 50% and increases its damage to absorb shields by an additional 250%.

73.name: Safeguard
73.description:
Intervene now has 2 charges and reduces the ally's damage taken by 20% for 5 sec.

Intervene's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

73.name: Storm of Destruction
73.description: Bladestorm, Ravager, and Demolish now snare all targets you hit by 60% for 6 sec and decrease their healing taken by 50% for 10 sec.

73.name: Berserker Roar
73.description: Berserker Shout also reduces the duration of the next crowd control effect within 10 sec by 50% on group members within 12 yds.

73.name: Power Through Adversity
73.description:
Second Wind reduces damage taken by 10% to 40%, with larger attacks being reduced by more.

While Shield Wall is active, healing reductions do not apply to you.

257.name: Psychic Shroud
257.description: When your Psychic Scream affects 1 or more players, the next crowd control effect against you is prevented. Lasts 6 sec.

257.name: Sanctified Ground
257.description: Holy Word: Sanctify blesses the ground with divine light, causing all allies who stand within to be immune to all silence and interrupt effects. Lasts for 5 sec.

257.name: Greater Heal
257.description: An exceptional spell that heals an ally for 40% of their maximum health, ignoring healing reduction effects.

257.name: Spirit of the Redeemer
257.description: Your Spirit of Redemption is now an active ability with a 2 minute cooldown, but the duration is reduced by 9 sec and you will no longer enter Spirit of Redemption upon dying.

257.name: Absolute Faith
257.description: Leap of Faith also pulls the spirit of the 3 furthest allies within 40 yards and shields you and the affected allies for 2,851.

257.name: Purification
257.description:
Purify now has a maximum of 2 charges.

Removing harmful effects with Purify grants your target an absorption shield equal to 5% of their maximum health. Lasts 8 sec.

257.name: Phase Shift
257.description:
Step into the shadows when you cast Fade, avoiding all attacks and spells for 1 sec.

Interrupt effects are not affected by Phase Shift.

257.name: Improved Mass Dispel
257.description: Reduces the cooldown of Mass Dispel by 60 sec.

581.name: Cleansed by Flame
581.description: Immolation Aura dispels a magical effect on you when cast.

581.name: Everlasting Hunt
581.description: Dealing damage increases your movement speed by 15% for 3 sec.

581.name: Jagged Spikes
581.description: While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause Physical damage equal to 30% of the damage taken back to the attacker.

581.name: Illidan's Grasp
581.description:
You strangle the target with demonic magic, stunning them in place and dealing 392 Shadow damage over 5 sec while the target is grasped. Can move while channeling.

Use Illidan's Grasp again to toss the target to a location within 20 yards.

581.name: Tormentor
581.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

581.name: Sigil Mastery
581.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sigils by an additional 25%.

581.name: Demonic Trample
581.description:
Transform to demon form, moving at 175% increased speed for 3 sec, knocking down all enemies in your path and dealing 5 Physical damage.

During Demonic Trample you are unaffected by snares but cannot cast spells or use your normal attacks. Shares charges with Infernal Strike.

581.name: Reverse Magic
581.description: Removes all harmful magical effects from yourself and all nearby allies within 10 yards, and sends them back to their original caster if possible.

581.name: Detainment
581.description: Imprison's PvP duration is increased by 1 sec, and targets become immune to damage and healing while imprisoned.

581.name: Unending Hatred
581.description: Taking damage causes you to gain Fury based on the damage dealt.

581.name: Blood Moon
581.description: Consume Magic now affects all enemies within 8 yards of the target and generates a Lesser Soul Fragment. Each effect consumed has a 5% chance to upgrade to a Greater Soul.

581.name: Cover of Darkness
581.description: The radius of Darkness is increased by 4 yds, and its duration by 2 sec.

581.name: Rain from Above
581.description: You fly into the air out of harm's way. While floating, you gain access to Fel Lance allowing you to deal damage to enemies below.

581.name: Glimpse
581.description: Vengeful Retreat provides immunity to loss of control effects, and reduces damage taken by 35% until you land.

581.name: Lay In Wait
581.description: Sigil of Misery has 2 charges and now lays in wait for up to 90 sec at your selected location until an enemy approaches.

265.name: Gateway Mastery
265.description: Increases the range of your Demonic Gateway by 20 yards, and reduces the cast time by 30%. Reduces the time between how often players can take your Demonic Gateway by 30 sec.

265.name: Rot and Decay
265.description:
Shadow Bolt damage increases the duration of your Corruption and Agony on the target by 2.0 sec.

Drain Life and Drain Soul damage increases the duration of your Corruption and Agony on the target by 1.0 sec.

265.name: Nether Ward
265.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

265.name: Essence Drain
265.description: Whenever you heal yourself with Drain Life, the enemy target deals 9% reduced damage to you for 10 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

265.name: Jinx
265.description: Casting a curse now applies Corruption and Agony to your target, but curses now costs 1 Soul Shard.

265.name: Shadow Rift
265.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

265.name: Bonds of Fel
265.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing 2,803 Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

265.name: Impish Instincts
265.description:
Taking direct Physical damage reduces the cooldown of Demonic Circle by 3 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 5 sec.

265.name: Soul Rip
265.description:
Fracture the soul of up to 3 target players within 20 yds into the shadows, reducing their damage done by 25% and healing received by 25% for 8 sec. Souls are fractured up to 20 yds from the player's location.

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

265.name: Soul Swap
265.description:
Copies your damage over time effects and Haunt from the target, preserving their duration.

Your next use of Soul Swap within 10 sec will exhale a copy damage of the effects onto a new target.

265.name: Bloodstones

262.name: Counterstrike Totem

259.description: Shiv also reduces the target's healing received by 30% for 8 sec.

259.name: Maneuverability
259.description: Sprint has 50% reduced cooldown and 50% reduced duration.

259.name: Death from Above
259.description:
Finishing move that empowers your weapons with energy to perform a deadly attack.

You leap into the air and Eviscerate your target on the way back down, with such force that it has a 15% stronger effect.

259.name: Smoke Bomb
259.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

259.name: Dismantle
259.description: Disarm the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield for 5 sec.

259.name: Thick as Thieves
259.description: Tricks of the Trade now increases the friendly target's damage by 15% for 6 sec.

259.name: Control is King
259.description: Cheap Shot grants Slice and Dice for 15 sec and Kidney Shot restores 10 Energy per combo point spent.

259.name: Dagger in the Dark
259.description: Each second while Stealth is active, nearby enemies within 12 yards take an additional 2% damage from you for 10 sec. Stacks up to 6 times.

259.name: Preemptive Maneuver
259.description: Feint decreases your damage taken by an additional 40% while stunned and its energy cost is reduced by 30%.

267.name: Fel Fissure
267.description: Chaos Bolt creates a 5 yd wide eruption of Felfire under the target, reducing movement speed by 50% and reducing all healing received by 25% on all enemies within the fissure. Lasts 6 sec.

267.name: Bane of Havoc
267.description: Curses the ground with a demonic bane, causing all of your single target spells to also strike targets marked with the bane for  60% of the damage dealt. Lasts 10 sec.

267.name: Nether Ward
267.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

267.name: Gateway Mastery
267.description: Increases the range of your Demonic Gateway by 20 yards, and reduces the cast time by 30%. Reduces the time between how often players can take your Demonic Gateway by 30 sec.

267.name: Shadow Rift
267.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

267.name: Bonds of Fel
267.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing 2,778 Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

267.name: Impish Instincts
267.description:
Taking direct Physical damage reduces the cooldown of Demonic Circle by 3 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 5 sec.

267.name: Soul Rip
267.description:
Fracture the soul of up to 3 target players within 20 yds into the shadows, reducing their damage done by 25% and healing received by 25% for 8 sec. Souls are fractured up to 20 yds from the player's location.

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

267.name: Bloodstones
267.description: Your Healthstones are replaced with Bloodstones which increase their user's haste by 20% for 12 sec instead of healing.

266.name: Call Fel Lord
266.description: Summon a fel lord to guard the location for 15 sec. Any enemy that comes within 6 yards will suffer 760 Physical damage, and players struck will be stunned for 1 sec.

266.name: Gateway Mastery
266.description: Increases the range of your Demonic Gateway by 20 yards, and reduces the cast time by 30%. Reduces the time between how often players can take your Demonic Gateway by 30 sec.

266.name: Nether Ward
266.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

266.name: Shadow Rift
266.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

266.name: Bonds of Fel
266.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing 2,766 Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

Cannot occur more than once every 5 sec.

266.name: Soul Rip
266.description:

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

266.name: Bloodstones
266.description: Your Healthstones are replaced with Bloodstones which increase their user's haste by 20% for 12 sec instead of healing.

72.name: Enduring Rage
72.description:
You have a chance to become Enraged while you are suffering movement impairing effects.

Suffering loss of control effects have a chance to grant you Recklessness for 5 sec.

72.name: Death Wish
72.description: Increases your damage taken and done by 10% for 15 sec at the cost of 10% of your health. Stacks up to 5 times.

72.name: Master and Commander
72.description: Cooldown of Rallying Cry reduced by 120 sec.

72.name: Disarm
72.description: Disarm the enemy's weapons and shield for 5 sec. Disarmed creatures deal significantly reduced damage.

72.name: Slaughterhouse
72.description: Rampage and Odyn's Fury damage reduce healing the target receives by 3% for 12 sec, stacking up to 12 times.

72.name: Demolition
72.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shattering Throw or Wrecking Throw by 50% and increases its damage to absorb shields by an additional 250%.

72.name: Rebound
72.description:
Spell Reflection reflects the next 2 incoming spells cast on you and reflected spells deal 100% extra damage to the attacker.

Spell Reflection's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

72.name: Safeguard
72.description:
Intervene now has 2 charges and reduces the ally's damage taken by 20% for 5 sec.

Intervene's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

72.name: Dragon Charge
72.description: Run at high speed at a distance in front of you. All enemies in your path will take 25 Physical damage and be knocked back.

72.name: Berserker Roar
72.description: Berserker Shout also reduces the duration of the next crowd control effect within 10 sec by 50% on group members within 12 yds.

251.name: Deathchill
251.description:
Your Remorseless Winter and Chains of Ice apply Deathchill, rooting the target in place for 4 sec.

Remorseless Winter 
All targets within 8 yards are afflicted with Deathchill when Remorseless Winter is cast.

Chains of Ice
When you Chains of Ice a target already afflicted by your Chains of Ice they will be afflicted by Deathchill.

251.name: Delirium
251.description: Howling Blast applies Delirium, reducing the cooldown recovery rate of movement enhancing abilities by 50% for 12 sec.

251.name: Shroud of Winter
251.description: Enemies within 8 yards of you become shrouded in winter, reducing the range of their spells and abilities by 30%.

251.name: Dark Simulacrum
251.description: Places a dark ward on an enemy player that persists for 12 sec, triggering when the enemy next spends mana on a spell, and allowing the Death Knight to unleash an exact duplicate of that spell.

251.name: Strangulate
251.description: Shadowy tendrils constrict an enemy's throat, silencing them for 4 sec.

251.name: Bitter Chill
251.description: Chains of Ice reduces the target's Haste by 8%. Frost Strike refreshes the duration of Chains of Ice.

251.name: Rot and Wither
251.description: Your Death and Decay rots enemies each time it deals damage, absorbing healing equal to 100% of damage dealt.

251.name: Bloodforged Armor
251.description: Death Strike reduces all Physical damage taken by 25% for 4 sec.

251.name: Spellwarden
251.description: Anti-Magic Shell is now usable on allies and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

251.name: Death's Cold Embrace
251.description:
Pillar of Frost grants you Remorseless Winter and increases its damage by 400% and its radius by 150%, but your movement speed is heavily reduced for its duration.

Pillar of Frost's cooldown is increased by 15 sec.

1468.name: Chrono Loop
1468.description: Trap the enemy in a time loop for 5 sec. Afterwards, they are returned to their previous location and health. Cannot reduce an enemy's health below 20%.

1468.name: Obsidian Mettle
1468.description: While Obsidian Scales is active you gain immunity to interrupt, silence, and pushback effects.

1468.name: Scouring Flame
1468.description: Fire Breath burns away 2 beneficial Magic effects from all targets.

1468.name: Time Stop
1468.description:
Freeze an ally's timestream for 5 sec. While frozen in time they are invulnerable, cannot act, and auras do not progress.

You may reactivate Time Stop to end this effect early.

1468.name: Swoop Up
1468.description: Grab an enemy and fly with them to the target location.

1468.name: Nullifying Shroud
1468.description: Verdant Embrace wreathes you in arcane energy, preventing the next full loss of control effect against you. Lasts 4 sec.

1468.name: Unburdened Flight
1468.description: Hover makes you immune to movement speed reduction effects.

1468.name: Divide and Conquer
1468.description: Deep Breath forms curtains of fire, preventing line of sight to enemies outside its walls and burning enemies who walk through them for 2,736 Fire damage. Lasts 6 sec.

1468.name: Dreamwalker's Embrace
1468.description:
Verdant Embrace tethers you to an ally, increasing movement speed by 40% and slowing and siphoning 475 life from enemies who come in contact with the tether.

The tether lasts up to 10 sec or until you move more than 30 yards away from your ally.

1468.name: Dream Projection
1468.description: Summon a flying projection of yourself that heals allies you pass through for 751. Detonating your projection dispels all nearby allies of Magical effects, and heals for 3,680 over 20 sec.

1468.name: Emerald Communion
1468.description:
Commune with the Emerald Dream, restoring 20% health and 2% mana every 0.9 sec for 4.5 sec. Overhealing is transferred to an injured ally within 40 yds.

Castable while stunned, disoriented, incapacitated, or silenced.

1480.description: Collapsing Star can no longer be interrupted and its cast time is reduced by 25%.

1480.name: Armor of Souls
1480.description: Your Armor is increased by 100%. Taking damage has a 12% chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

1480.name: Surrender to the Void
1480.description:
Void Metamorphosis requires 50 additional souls.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your damage is increased by 10% and effects that grant you Fury grant 100% additional Fury.

1480.name: Cleansed by Flame
1480.description: Immolation Aura dispels a magical effect on you when cast.

1480.name: Cover of Darkness
1480.description: The radius of Darkness is increased by 4 yds, and its duration by 2 sec.

1480.name: Detainment
1480.description: Imprison's PvP duration is increased by 1 sec, and targets become immune to damage and healing while imprisoned.

1480.name: Glimpse
1480.description: Vengeful Retreat provides immunity to loss of control effects, and reduces damage taken by 35% until you land.

1480.name: Beckon
1480.description: Reap reduces the cast time of your next Consume by 100% and causes it to generate 1 additional Soul Fragment.

1480.name: Reverse Magic
1480.description: Removes all harmful magical effects from yourself and all nearby allies within 10 yards, and sends them back to their original caster if possible.
